'''nozalaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:nicetish|nicetish]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-z-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nicetish|nicetish]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| nozalaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:nozalithi|nozalithi]] || [[word:nozaliji|nozaliji]] || [[word:nozalishi|nozalishi]] || [[word:nozaliki|nozaliki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:nozaluthuthu|nozaluthuthu]] || [[word:nozalujuju|nozalujuju]] || [[word:nozalushushu|nozalushushu]] || [[word:nozalukuku|nozalukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:nozaluthu|nozaluthu]] || [[word:nozaluju|nozaluju]] || [[word:nozalushu|nozalushu]] || [[word:nozaluku|nozaluku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:nozalufthuf|nozalufthuf]] || [[word:nozalufjuf|nozalufjuf]] || [[word:nozalufshuf|nozalufshuf]] || [[word:nozalufkuf|nozalufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:nozalethe|nozalethe]] || [[word:nozaleje|nozaleje]] || [[word:nozaleshe|nozaleshe]] || [[word:nozaleke|nozaleke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:nozalothotho|nozalothotho]] || [[word:nozalojojo|nozalojojo]] || [[word:nozaloshosho|nozaloshosho]] || [[word:nozalokoko|nozalokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:nozalotho|nozalotho]] || [[word:nozalojo|nozalojo]] || [[word:nozalosho|nozalosho]] || [[word:nozaloko|nozaloko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:nozalofthof|nozalofthof]] || [[word:nozalofjof|nozalofjof]] || [[word:nozalofshof|nozalofshof]] || [[word:nozalofkof|nozalofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:nozalÃŸfthÃŸf|nozalÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:nozalÃŸfjÃŸf|nozalÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:nozalÃŸfshÃŸf|nozalÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:nozalÃŸfkÃŸf|nozalÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:nozalÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|nozalÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:nozalÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|nozalÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:nozalÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|nozalÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:nozalÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|nozalÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:nozalÃŸfthÃŸf|nozalÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:nozalÃŸfjÃŸf|nozalÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:nozalÃŸfshÃŸf|nozalÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:nozalÃŸfkÃŸf|nozalÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:nozalÃŸfthÃŸf|nozalÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:nozalÃŸfjÃŸf|nozalÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:nozalÃŸfshÃŸf|nozalÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:nozalÃŸfkÃŸf|nozalÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:nozalÃḊthÃḊ|nozalÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:nozalÃḊjÃḊ|nozalÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:nozalÃḊshÃḊ|nozalÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:nozalÃḊkÃḊ|nozalÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:nozalathatha|nozalathatha]] || [[word:nozalajaja|nozalajaja]] || [[word:nozalashasha|nozalashasha]] || [[word:nozalakaka|nozalakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:nozalatha|nozalatha]] || [[word:nozalaja|nozalaja]] || [[word:nozalasha|nozalasha]] || [[word:nozalaka|nozalaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:nozalafthaf|nozalafthaf]] || [[word:nozalafjaf|nozalafjaf]] || [[word:nozalafshaf|nozalafshaf]] || [[word:nozalafkaf|nozalafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:nozalasha|nozalasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:nozalshÃḋsha|nozalshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nozalrosha|nozalrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nozalmusha|nozalmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:nozalyasha|nozalyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonozalnkshÃḋsha|gonozalnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonozalnkrosha|gonozalnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonozalnkmusha|gonozalnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonozalnkyasha|gonozalnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:nozazalasha|nozazalasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:nozazalshÃḋsha|nozazalshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nozazalrosha|nozazalrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nozazalmusha|nozazalmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:nozazalyasha|nozazalyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonozazalnkshÃḋsha|gonozazalnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonozazalnkrosha|gonozazalnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonozazalnkmusha|gonozazalnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonozazalnkyasha|gonozazalnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:nezÃḊlasha|nezÃḊlasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:nezÃḊlshÃḋsha|nezÃḊlshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nezÃḊlrosha|nezÃḊlrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nezÃḊlmusha|nezÃḊlmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:nezÃḊlyasha|nezÃḊlyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonezÃḊlnkshÃḋsha|gonezÃḊlnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonezÃḊlnkrosha|gonezÃḊlnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonezÃḊlnkmusha|gonezÃḊlnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonezÃḊlnkyasha|gonezÃḊlnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:nozfalasha|nozfalasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:nozfalshÃḋsha|nozfalshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nozfalrosha|nozfalrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nozfalmusha|nozfalmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:nozfalyasha|nozfalyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonozfalnkshÃḋsha|gonozfalnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonozfalnkrosha|gonozfalnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonozfalnkmusha|gonozfalnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonozfalnkyasha|gonozfalnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|718161e}}
